0110110011111100 0110001100011010 1 -> sum: 1101000000010111, cout: 0
0011100101001011 0100110011011101 0 -> sum: 1000011000101000, cout: 0

0110000110001111 0101110100110111 0 -> sum: 1011111011000110, cout: 0
1101110101011011 0010101101011111 1 -> sum: 0000100010111011, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
